RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed as of April 18, 2026, driving massive capital influx, record XRPL transaction volume, and XRP surges amid resolved SEC battle and nearing XRP ETF approvals.[1]

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet Launch Goes Live on April 15 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet Launch Goes Live on April 15 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Rakuten Wallet launched on April 15, 2026, coinciding with XRP's first 2026 touch above $1.50 (intraday high $1.51094 on April 17), supported by spot ETF inflows of $224M in early April that preceded futures activity for sustained momentum.[3]
